title: 校准窗口可直接关闭
changes: Add a close button to the MediaPipe gesture calibration window.
Closing the calibration window automatically clears the calibration-window setting.
Apply the same close behavior to the Apple Vision fallback preview window.
verification: 33 Swift tests and 22 native core checks passed.
Universal App build and codesign verification passed.
notes: This build is a local candidate pending real-device confirmation of the close button and preview toggle state.
